The '''Krayt Draggers''' was a [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] led by [[Kav Lepkin]], with about 15 members. The gang was located in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Their name and gang symbol were based on the [[Krayt dragon/Legends|Krayt dragon]] and the [[Binary star/Legends|binary suns]].
